Title: Werner, Alfred
Overview: Utrillo scholar, wrote the volume on the artist for the Abrams Great Art of the Ages series.
Selected Bibliography: Degas Pastels. New York: Watson-Guptill Publications, 1968; Maurice Utrillo. New York, H. N. Abrams, 1969; [provided commentaries to the plates of] Lipchitz, Jacques. Amedeo Modigliani. New York: H. N. Abrams, 1969.
